Class RepositoryBundle

java.lang.Object
shelter.startup.RepositoryBundle
public class RepositoryBundle extends Object
Groups all repositories created during startup into one object. This keeps startup wiring readable by avoiding long parameter lists.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RepositoryBundle(ShelterRepository shelterRepository, AnimalRepository animalRepository, AdopterRepository adopterRepository, AdoptionRequestRepository adoptionRequestRepository, TransferRequestRepository transferRequestRepository, VaccineTypeRepository vaccineTypeRepository, VaccinationRecordRepository vaccinationRecordRepository, AuditRepository auditRepository)
    Constructs a repository bundle containing every repository used by startup wiring.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AdopterRepository
    adopterRepository()
    Provides access to the adopter repository for loading and persisting adopter records.
    AdoptionRequestRepository
    adoptionRequestRepository()
    Provides access to the adoption request repository for loading and persisting adoption requests.
    AnimalRepository
    animalRepository()
    Provides access to the animal repository for loading and persisting animal records.
    AuditRepository
    auditRepository()
    Provides access to the audit repository for appending and retrieving audit log entries.
    ShelterRepository
    shelterRepository()
    Provides access to the shelter repository for loading and persisting shelter records.
    TransferRequestRepository
    transferRequestRepository()
    Provides access to the transfer request repository for loading and persisting transfer requests.
    VaccinationRecordRepository
    vaccinationRecordRepository()
    Provides access to the vaccination record repository for loading and persisting individual vaccination events.
    VaccineTypeRepository
    vaccineTypeRepository()
    Provides access to the vaccine type repository for loading and persisting vaccine type definitions.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • RepositoryBundle

      public RepositoryBundle(ShelterRepository shelterRepository, AnimalRepository animalRepository, AdopterRepository adopterRepository, AdoptionRequestRepository adoptionRequestRepository, TransferRequestRepository transferRequestRepository, VaccineTypeRepository vaccineTypeRepository, VaccinationRecordRepository vaccinationRecordRepository, AuditRepository auditRepository)
      Constructs a repository bundle containing every repository used by startup wiring.
      Parameters:
      shelterRepository - the shelter repository
      animalRepository - the animal repository
      adopterRepository - the adopter repository
      adoptionRequestRepository - the adoption request repository
      transferRequestRepository - the transfer request repository
      vaccineTypeRepository - the vaccine type repository
      vaccinationRecordRepository - the vaccination record repository
      auditRepository - the audit repository

  • Method Details

    • shelterRepository

      public ShelterRepository shelterRepository()
      Provides access to the shelter repository for loading and persisting shelter records. Returns the instance supplied to this bundle at construction time.
      Returns:
      the shelter repository

    • animalRepository

      public AnimalRepository animalRepository()
      Provides access to the animal repository for loading and persisting animal records. Returns the instance supplied to this bundle at construction time.
      Returns:
      the animal repository

    • adopterRepository

      public AdopterRepository adopterRepository()
      Provides access to the adopter repository for loading and persisting adopter records. Returns the instance supplied to this bundle at construction time.
      Returns:
      the adopter repository

    • adoptionRequestRepository

      public AdoptionRequestRepository adoptionRequestRepository()
      Provides access to the adoption request repository for loading and persisting adoption requests. Returns the instance supplied to this bundle at construction time.
      Returns:
      the adoption request repository

    • transferRequestRepository

      public TransferRequestRepository transferRequestRepository()
      Provides access to the transfer request repository for loading and persisting transfer requests. Returns the instance supplied to this bundle at construction time.
      Returns:
      the transfer request repository

    • vaccineTypeRepository

      public VaccineTypeRepository vaccineTypeRepository()
      Provides access to the vaccine type repository for loading and persisting vaccine type definitions. Returns the instance supplied to this bundle at construction time.
      Returns:
      the vaccine type repository

    • vaccinationRecordRepository

      public VaccinationRecordRepository vaccinationRecordRepository()
      Provides access to the vaccination record repository for loading and persisting individual vaccination events. Returns the instance supplied to this bundle at construction time.
      Returns:
      the vaccination record repository

    • auditRepository

      public AuditRepository auditRepository()
      Provides access to the audit repository for appending and retrieving audit log entries. Returns the instance supplied to this bundle at construction time.
      Returns:
      the audit repository
